hooks.command: cd D:/TG/gw-automation && if ! git diff --quiet HEAD 2>/dev/null; then output=$(python -m pytest --tb=no -q 2>&1 | tail -5) && python -c "import json,sys; output=sys.argv[1]; msg='⚠️ pytest 미설치 — 가상환경 활성화 후 pip install pytest' if 'No module' in output else '🧪 pytest 결과\n'+output; print(json.dumps({'systemMessage': msg}))" "$output" 2>/dev/null; fi || true

python3 -c "import sys,json,subprocess,re; data=json.load(sys.stdin); cmd=data.get('tool_input',{}).get('command',''); matched=re.search(r'git\s+(commit|push)',cmd); r=subprocess.run(['git','-C','D:/TG/gw-automation','diff','--cached','--name-only'],capture_output=True,text=True) if matched else None; found=r and re.search(r'^config/\.env$|^\.env$',r.stdout,re.M); found and print(json.dumps({'continue':False,'stopReason':'⛔ config/.env 가 스테이징에 포함됨!\ngit rm --cached config/.env 실행 후 다시 시도하세요.'}))" 2>/dev/null || true
